scope.summary: E3 audit hash-chain e2e: 10 adversarial tests against real files covering record-everything inventory reconciliation, tail-truncation detection via anchor sidecar, mid-chain edit/drop/reorder detection, anchor MAC forgery refusal, fail-closed open, and anchor round-trip.
out_of_scope: live Oracle database integration (requires container harness)

entry_points.name: cargo test -p oraclemcp-audit --test e3_audit_chain_e2e
entry_points.trace: 10 tests pass: intact chain verify+anchor, anchor round-trip, mid-chain edit detected+located, mid-chain drop detected+located, reorder detected, tail truncation invisible to chain but caught by anchor, empty-log truncation detected, forged anchor MAC refused, fail-closed open, privileged-action inventory reconciliation (5 actions cross-checked by tool+sql_sha256, gap-free seq 1..=5, chain verify, anchor match)

limitations: Tests exercise FileAuditSink and anchor sidecar against real temp files, not a live Oracle database
Rekor transparency log anchoring is not exercised in this suite
